models.elevenlabs_llm_note: ElevenLabs does not support Opus - Sonnet 4.6 is the best Claude available

setup_notes.bash_version: macOS default bash (3.2) does not support declare -A. Use /usr/local/bin/bash (5.x) installed via brew.
setup_notes.elevenlabs_tts_models: English agents only accept 'eleven_turbo_v2' or 'eleven_flash_v2'. v2.5 and v3 are rejected.
setup_notes.elevenlabs_llm_models: No Opus available. Best Claude is claude-sonnet-4-6. Full list includes gpt-5.x, gemini-3.x, claude-sonnet-4-6.
setup_notes.phone_numbers: List via GET /v1/convai/phone-numbers. Link to agent via PATCH /v1/convai/phone-numbers/{id} with {agent_id: ...}
